meta.title: Spec Review: ClawTok MVP
meta.description: Interactive feedback capture for ClawTok spec review

props.title: ClawTok MVP Feedback
props.subtitle: Rate each spec — your decisions persist in localStorage

items.title: Discover: CLP Tier-1 Categories
items.insight: Full-screen 2-column category grid as Discover entry point. All 12 AICategory cases displayed. **Score: 80** (highest overall). Uses existing enum — low risk, high impact.
items.detail: 3 new files (CategoryGridView, CategoryFeedView, StickyCategoryBar). ~400 LOC new. No backend dependency. Mock data only.

items.title: Profile: View/Creator Mode Split
items.insight: Split portfolio (viewing) from creator tools (creating). Horizontal scroll quick-action bar replacing 2x3 grid. **Score: 66**. Addresses verbatim user feedback.
items.detail: Major refactor of ProfileView.swift (698 → ~500 lines). 3 new files. ~350 LOC new. @AppStorage persistence.

items.title: Music Module: Podcast Support
items.insight: Extend Music module with Podcast/Episode/Chapter models. NotebookLM badge. Player with speed/sleep/chapters. **Score: 68**. AI podcasts are exploding.
items.detail: 4 new views, ~800 LOC new. New models in MusicModels.swift. MusicHubView gets tab. No backend dependency.

items.title: kingly.cloud Inference Router
items.insight: Cross-cutting multi-provider LLM gateway. **Score: 66** (GO with caveats). Multi-month epic. Seed exists at plugins/claw-router/.
items.detail: ~3,700 LOC (Go + Swift + SQL). 5 phases over 15 weeks. Unified architecture doc at docs/_inbox/. claw-router routing is decorative — needs real logic.
